case_title: SETH B. COHEN et al VS. MICHAEL'S MOVING & STORAGE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MICHAEL'S MOVING & STORAGE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (5060.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MICHAEL'S MOVING & STORAGE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-29-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT GRANTS LEAVE TO FILE THIS LATE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. IF THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT HAVE A LOCAL REPRESENTATIVE, DEFENDANT MAY MAKE WRITTEN REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE AND SUBMIT DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IN ADVANCE, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPIES MAILED TO PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY COHEN, SETH B. PECHET, TAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL'S MOVING & STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COHEN, SETH B. PECHET, TAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL'S MOVING & STORAGE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF COHEN, SETH B.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2009 - CONTINUED ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING TO FEB-02-2009 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COHEN, SETH B. PECHET, TAMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICHAEL'S MOVING & STORAGE $630.00 PRINCIPAL, $102.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $732.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
